hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<< "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"); case "$FILE_PATH" in *.ts) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | head -50 ;; esac
FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<< "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"); case "$FILE_PATH" in *.ts) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx eslint --fix --cache "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -50 ;; esac

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<< "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"); case "$FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.mts|*.cts|*.json|*.md) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -20 ;; esac

COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' <<< "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"); case "$COMMAND" in "gh pr create"*) if [ "${ZOD_NEST_SKIP_DOCS_CHECK:-}" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; SRC=$(git diff --name-only main..HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -c '^src/' || true); DOCS=$(git diff --name-only main..HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -cE '^(README\.md|docs/|MIGRATION\.md)' || true); if [ "$SRC" -gt 0 ] && [ "$DOCS" -eq 0 ]; then echo '[zod-nest] src/ changed without README/docs/MIGRATION updates. Run /sync-docs to detect drift, or export ZOD_NEST_SKIP_DOCS_CHECK=1 to bypass for refactor-only PRs.' >&2; exit 1; fi ;; esac
